title: Piper ungaramense
taxonomy: Piper ungaramense is classified within the family Piperaceae. This family is a part of the order Piperales and is a group of flowering plants commonly known as pepper plants. intro: Piper ungaramense is a species of flowering plant in the pepper family (Piperaceae), native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, with health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Piper ungaramense include alkaloids, terpenoids, and phenolic compounds, including piperine, which is responsible for its therapeutic effects.
